_comment: Controls synthetic dataset generation. Change base_seed to regenerate with different randomness. All other values reflect Phase 1 decisions.
_seed_note: Per-sample seed is derived as base_seed + sample_index. This makes every sample independently reproducible.
_target_note: mvp = 100 samples per difficulty per domain (1,200 total). Change to 'full' for 200/difficulty/domain.
_task_note: Each sample gets a single task label. The same ocr_text may appear across multiple tasks in different samples.

task_distribution._comment: Fraction of samples per difficulty assigned to each task. Must sum to 1.0.

validator_settings._comment: Rules the noise engine validator enforces before accepting a generated sample.
validator_settings._survival_note: At easy/medium, required fields must remain recoverable (not completely destroyed) after noise.
validator_settings._degraded_note: At extreme, at least 1 required field must be degraded or absent to qualify as genuinely hard.
